metadata.name: Diagnose High Latency in Core Network

description: Multiple alerts indicate high latency between two core network routers. The agent must find the cause.

nodes.task_description: Identify the two routers from the alerts and retrieve their performance metrics.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent correctly identifies the routers and their current CPU and memory load.

nodes.task_description: Run a traceroute between the two routers to identify the specific hop causing the delay.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent runs the traceroute and identifies a specific intermediate router with high latency.

nodes.task_description: Create a high-priority ticket for the core networking team, specifying the problematic router and attaching the traceroute logs.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent creates a detailed and actionable trouble ticket.
